creator: mjl@luckie.org.nz
text:
Created attachment 161155
patch to update libbgpdump to 1.4.99.15

According to the ChangeLog, the only user visible change is the implementation of a -p option to show packet index when using -M and -m options.  Looking over

https://bitbucket.org/ripencc/bgpdump/commits/all

Shows that the two patches in the FreeBSD port are no longer required.
